title: 三种高级反幻觉验证技术对比

body.itemB: Best-of-N 验证 / 迭代精炼

dimensions.name: 做法
dimensions.a: 让 Claude 先逐步展示推理过程，再给出最终答案，暴露错误逻辑
dimensions.b: Best-of-N：同一 prompt 跑多次，对比输出找不一致；迭代精炼：把前一轮输出作为下一轮输入，让 Claude 验证和修正

dimensions.name: 适用场景
dimensions.a: 逻辑推理、数学计算等需要严密推导的任务
dimensions.b: Best-of-N 适合事实性问答；迭代精炼适合长文生成和复杂分析

dimensions.name: 成本
dimensions.a: 单次调用，成本低，但输出更长
dimensions.b: Best-of-N 成本是 N 倍；迭代精炼需要多轮调用

dimensions.name: Method
dimensions.a: Ask Claude to show step-by-step reasoning before the final answer, exposing faulty logic
dimensions.b: Best-of-N: run the same prompt multiple times and compare outputs for inconsistencies. Iterative refinement: feed previous output as input for follow-up, asking Claude to verify and correct

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.a: Tasks requiring rigorous reasoning: logic, math, multi-step deduction
dimensions.b: Best-of-N for factual Q&A; iterative refinement for long-form generation and complex analysis

dimensions.name: Cost
dimensions.a: Single call, low cost, but longer output
dimensions.b: Best-of-N costs N times more; iterative refinement requires multiple round-trips
